description: Shared semantic map for canon concepts used across Booksmith AI books.

concepts.label: Panentheism
concepts.definition: The view that the universe exists within God while God also exceeds the universe.

concepts.label: Meta-Equivalence Principle
concepts.definition: A proposed principle that apparent opposites may be locally distinguishable while globally participating in a deeper unity.

concepts.label: Coherence
concepts.definition: Patterned alignment, intelligibility, relationship, or integration within a system or field.

concepts.label: Decoherence
concepts.definition: In physics, loss of quantum phase coherence through environmental interaction; in the canon, also used as a carefully marked metaphysical extension for apparent separation or differentiation.

concepts.label: Synchronicity
concepts.definition: Meaningful coincidence or acausal connection as developed in Jungian psychology.

concepts.label: Eternal Now
concepts.definition: A philosophical and mystical frame in which moments participate in a deeper whole beyond ordinary linear sequence.

concepts.label: Krystal Spiral
concepts.definition: A symbolic geometry for recursive consciousness, harmonic observation, memory, return, and transformation.

concepts.label: Greenshift
concepts.definition: A proposed regenerative center-zone where expansion and return, coherence and decoherence, death and resurrection meet.

concepts.label: Federation
concepts.definition: A coherent structure of sovereign participants who preserve agency while creating higher-order cooperation.

concepts.label: AI Singularity
concepts.definition: A family of hypotheses concerning accelerating AI capability, intelligence amplification, and possible civilizational transition.

concepts.label: Game Theory
concepts.definition: The mathematical study of strategic interaction, relevant to cooperation, alignment, governance, economics, and federation design.
